title: Create Ultimate Resource Automation – Unofficial Fix (Create Fly
description:
Unofficial fix and port of “Ultimate Resource Automation” for Create Fly on Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric).

This project restores the original datapack functionality and adapts it to modern Fabric + Create Fly, fixing broken recipes and compatibility issues.
body:
What this fixes
Recipes not loading or missing
Incompatibility with Fabric 1.21+ datapack format
Fluid unit mismatch (Create Fly internal units)
Incorrect or broken Create recipe serializers
REI not displaying recipes properly
⚙️ Features
All original recipes restored:
Compacting
Mixing
Haunting
Splashing
Crushing
Recipes aligned with original mod behavior (chances, outputs, logic)
Converted into a data mod (.jar) for better stability
Fully compatible with Create Fly
📦 Requirements
Create Fly
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
🧪 Tested on
Minecraft 1.21.11
Fabric Loader 0.18+
Create Fly 6.0.9-5
📥 Installation
Remove old datapack version (if installed)
Place this .jar in your mods folder
Launch the game
⚠️ Disclaimer

This is an unofficial fix.
All credit for the original concept goes to the original datapack/mod author.

🛠️ Notes
Some recipes depend on additional mods (e.g. fluids/items from addons)
REI may still show inconsistencies depending on its version
💬 Feedback

If you find bugs or incorrect recipes, please report them.
(text made by AI)
